name: Flow2API Captcha Worker
description: Generate Google Labs reCAPTCHA Enterprise tokens for Flow2API.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ws://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* https://labs.google/* https://www.google.com/*;
